mapper.select: SELECT t1.* FROM fund_info t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT fund_code, MAX(data_time) as max_time FROM fund_info WHERE data_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND (is_custom = 0 OR is_custom IS NULL) GROUP BY fund_code ) t2 ON t1.fund_code = t2.fund_code AND t1.data_time = t2.max_time WHERE (t1.is_custom = 0 OR t1.is_custom IS NULL) ORDER BY t1.calmar_rank LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM fund_info WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT id FROM ( SELECT id FROM fund_info WHERE (is_custom = 0 OR is_custom IS NULL) AND (is_holding = 0 OR is_holding IS NULL) ORDER BY data_time DESC LIMIT #{keepCount} ) tmp ) AND (is_custom = 0 OR is_custom IS NULL) AND (is_holding = 0 OR is_holding IS NULL)
